title: Zhihu Inc. to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on June 3, 2026
description: BEIJING, China, May 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Zhihu Inc. (“Zhihu” or the “Company”) (NYSE: ZH; HKEX: 2390), a leading online content community in China, today announced that it will report its unaudited financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 before the U.S. market opens on June 3, 2026.

description: Hong Kong, May 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Click Holdings Limited (“Click Holdings” or “Click” or “we” or “us”, NASDAQ: CLIK) and its subsidiaries (collectively, the “Company”), a leader in human resources and senior care solutions in Hong Kong, today announced outstanding interim results for the six months ended 31 December 2025, delivering strong revenue growth and a decisive swing from loss to profit.

title: SatVu zooms in on energy facilities in Cuba, India and Australia

HotSat-2, built by Surrey Satellite Technology Ltd., is the second satellite in SatVu’s commercial high-resolution thermal-imaging constellation. The first, HotSat-1, failed six months after launch. HotSat-2 images released May 7 show refining of domestic crude […]
